overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval town at night. The character navigates from a narrow torch-lit alley past guards, through open courtyards with a gothic cathedral visible, and into crowded narrow streets. The atmosphere is dark and moody with mixed lighting from torches and moonlight.

events.description: Geralt begins walking forward past the guards
passes through wooden gate structure into more open courtyard area

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks cautiously through the narrow alley, passing the guards with torches

notable_agents.action: three guards holding torches stand in the alley, watching Geralt pass

wooden gate structure blocking the alley
group of three guards holding burning torches

segments.scene_description: Geralt stands in a narrow stone alley facing three guards with torches. He walks forward past them through a wooden gate structure, transitioning from the enclosed alley into a more open courtyard area.

events.description: moon becomes visible in the night sky as Geralt moves into the open courtyard
approaching the large stone archway entrance to the cathedral area

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily through the open courtyard toward the cathedral towers

entered.detail: large gothic cathedral with twin towers visible in the distance
crescent moon visible in the night sky
patches of grass growing between cobblestones
wooden fence structure along the right side

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges into a wide open courtyard with the gothic cathedral towers visible ahead against the night sky. The crescent moon illuminates the scene as he walks across the cobblestone and grass toward the cathedral entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow medieval street with stone archway

events.description: passes through the large stone archway into the narrow street
slight turn to navigate the winding narrow street

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks through the stone archway and continues down the narrow winding streets

tall stone walls of the church building
wooden bench against the stone wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes through the imposing stone archway into a narrow enclosed street. The high stone walls of the church rise on the left as he navigates the winding cobblestone path, leaving the open courtyard behind.

events.description: encounters a group of townspeople gathered in the narrow street
slows down while navigating through the crowd of townspeople

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaches and carefully walks through a group of townspeople in the narrow street

notable_agents.action: shirtless townsman walking past Geralt in the narrow street
group of townspeople standing and conversing in the street

entered.detail: wooden cart with canvas cover parked on the left side
group of townspeople gathered in the street
wooden scaffolding structure against the building

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues through the narrow streets and encounters a crowd of townspeople, including a shirtless man walking past. He navigates around a wooden cart and scaffolding while moving through the moderate crowd in the torch-lit street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic stone alleyway into a vast open courtyard before winding back into the crowded streets of a medieval town. It begins with Geralt facing three torch-bearing guards in a narrow alley, moving past them through a wooden gate that opens the view into a wide courtyard. As he crosses the cobblestones and grass, the scene expands to reveal towering gothic cathedral spires silhouetted against a crescent moon. The camera then follows him through an imposing stone archway, where the open space shifts back into a narrow, winding street flanked by high church walls. Finally, the path leads into a torch-lit thoroughfare crowded with townspeople, navigating past a wooden cart and scaffolding as the environment becomes densely populated.
